mapper.select: select NOTICE_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONT, TO_CHAR(NOTICE_AT, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as NOTICE_AT, NOTICE_CNT from notice_board
mapper.insert: insert into notice_board(NOTICE_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONT, NOTICE_AT, NOTICE_CNT) values( seq_notice_board.nextval, #{notice_title}, #{notice_cont}, sysdate, 0 )
